messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## GKE → OKE (Oracle Kubernetes Engine)

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| GKE | OKE |
| Autopilot | OKE (managed nodes) |
| GKE Enterprise | OKE Enterprise |

### OKE Features

- Managed Kubernetes
- Node pools
- Integrated networking
- VCN-native

### Diferencas

- OKE usa OCI VCN networking
- Node shapes flexiveis
- Always free tier available

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_containerengine_cluster" "oke" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name          = "oke-cluster"
  kubernetes_version = "v1.28.2"
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
}

resource "oci_containerengine_node_pool" "pool" {
  cluster_id = oci_containerengine_cluster.oke.id
  node_shape = "VM.Standard2.4"
  quantity_per_subnet = 3
}
```

### kubectl

```bash
oci containerengine cluster get-credentials --cluster-id $CLUSTER_ID
```
